=== Refactor Inventory ===

  Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"sampleReturnsConciseBody\")" (refactor.rewrite.effect.effectGenToFn)
  Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleReturnTypeAnnotation)

[R2] selection: "13:8-13:8"
  Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"withGenerics\")" (refactor.rewrite.effect.effectGenToFn)
  Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleReturnTypeAnnotation)

  (no refactors)

=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"sampleReturnsConciseBody\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_returns.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = Eff.fn("sampleReturnsConciseBody")(function* <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1);
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2);
    return a + b;
});

export const withGenerics = <A extends number, B>(a: A, b: B): Eff.Effect<A, B> =>
    Eff.gen(function*() {
        if(Math.random() > 0.5){
            return yield* Eff.fail(b)
        }
        return a
    })


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_returns.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
    Eff.gen(function*() {
      const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
      const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
      return a + b
    })

export const withGenerics = <A extends number, B>(a: A, b: B): Eff.Effect<A, B> =>
    Eff.gen(function*() {
        if(Math.random() > 0.5){
            return yield* Eff.fail(b)
        }
        return a
    })


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"withGenerics\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_returns.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B): Eff.Effect<number> =>
    Eff.gen(function*() {
      const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
      const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
      return a + b
    })

export const withGenerics = Eff.fn("withGenerics")(function* <A extends number, B>(a: A, b: B) {
    if (Math.random() > 0.5) {
        return yield* Eff.fail(b);
    }
    return a;
});


=== [R2] Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn_returns.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B): Eff.Effect<number> =>
    Eff.gen(function*() {
      const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
      const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
      return a + b
    })

export const withGenerics = <A extends number, B>(a: A, b: B) =>
    Eff.gen(function*() {
        if(Math.random() > 0.5){
            return yield* Eff.fail(b)
        }
        return a
    })
